name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons
notes: This Building Block detects uncommon error codes on failed logons to determine suspicious activity and tampering with accounts that have been disabled or somehow restricted.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure, Authentication.General Authentication Failed
when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [0xC0000072 or 0xC000006F or 0xC0000070 or 0xC0000413 or 0xC000018C or 0xC000015B]
when the event matches "Target Account Security ID" = 'S-1-0-0' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Account Tampering - Suspicious Failed Logon Reasons on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure, Authentication.General Authentication Failed
AND when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [0xC0000072 or 0xC000006F or 0xC0000070 or 0xC0000413 or 0xC000018C or 0xC000015B]
AND NOT when the event matches "Target Account Security ID" = 'S-1-0-0' AQL filter query
